title: mystacidium inapertum
intro: Mystacidium inapertum, also known as the Yellow Eyed Orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. It is a type of terrestrial orchid that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mystacidium inapertum are said to include relief from fever, headache, and respiratory issues, as well as a possible treatment for snake bites and other venomous animal stings. In herbal preparations, Mystacidium inapertum is often made into a decoction or infusion, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
